title: eruca vesicaria subvar. oleracea
intro: Eruca vesicaria subvar. oleracea, also known as wild rocket or arugula, is a leafy green vegetable belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of consuming Eruca vesicaria subvar. oleracea include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
